raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AJR 16 calls on the United States Congress and the President to declare a national emergency due to environmental harm and public health risks from transboundary pollution.",
    "More than 200 billion gallons of toxic wastewater have crossed into California through the Tijuana River since 2018.",
    "The South Bay International Wastewater Treatment Plant is underfunded and out of compliance with the Clean Water Act.",
    "Recent studies by the Scripps Institution of Oceanography linked up to 76 percent of bacteria in the City of Imperial Beach’s air to transboundary flow pollution.",
    "The CDC and the County of San Diego's CASPER survey found that the sewage crisis is disrupting the lives of the surveyed population, reducing outdoor activities for more than 70 percent of them.",
    "AJR 16 calls for full funding of the EPA’s infrastructure plan to stop sewage spills at the source.",
    "AJR 16 seeks a national emergency declaration to unlock additional federal resources.",
    "AJR 16 demands long-term operation and maintenance support for wastewater treatment facilities.",
    "AJR 16 requests immediate action to end beach closures which have lasted over 1,270 consecutive days in some areas.",
    "AJR 16 advocates for federal investments to address pollution in the New River affecting the community of Calexico."
  ]
}
```
